name: Weather-Aware Booking
description: Branches on weather-API forecast to offer reschedule vs. confirm.

args.body: Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental. The forecast looks rough on your visit day — would you like to move your appointment to a sunnier slot? Just reply with a day that works and we'll take care of the rest. No pressure either way!

args.subject: You're all set at Bright Smile Dental
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

Your visit at Bright Smile Dental is confirmed for {{bookingStartsAt}}. The weather looks good, so you're set to head our way — no need to reschedule.

A few friendly reminders:
• Arrive a few minutes early so we can welcome you in.
• If anything comes up, just reply to this email and we'll sort it out — zero pressure.
• Your visit is painless and unhurried; we'll walk you through every step.

Looking forward to seeing you,
The Bright Smile Dental team
